entities.description: A statistical method used to test significant differences among treatments

entities.description: A dimensionality-reduction method used to analyze soil quality indicators

entities.description: A biological quality component of soil that impacts physicochemical properties

entities.description: A chemical property of soil used as a quality indicator

entities.description: A physical property of soil related to the volume of pores

entities.name: LANDSCAPE POSITION
entities.description: The relative position of a land unit within a landscape affecting soil attributes

entities.name: CALCIUM

entities.name: BASE SATURATION
entities.description: The percentage of the soil's cation exchange capacity occupied by basic cations

entities.description: A specific type of soil and water conservation structure

entities.description: A specific type of soil and water conservation structure

entities.description: The measure of crop yield per unit area
